_readme: チャンネル定義ファイル。アプリは1つ・設定はチャンネル別。api_env_prefix を設定すると、そのチャンネルは <PREFIX>_OPENAI_API_KEY / <PREFIX>_GEMINI_API_KEY / <PREFIX>_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY を優先使用（未設定なら共通キーにフォールバック）。Render の環境変数でキーを管理するとデプロイで消えず安全。

defaults.worldview_desc: Consistent warm, modern educational illustration world used throughout the whole video. Soft, cohesive color palette (warm tones with one calm accent color — not always blue). Clean flat-vector style with gentle shading, approachable and trustworthy mood. Keep the same character design, line weight, and palette across every scene so the video feels like one unified series.

Consistent educational illustration world for an economics-research YouTube channel. Clean flat-vector anime style with bold clear outlines and gentle shading. THE PROFESSOR (the channel's signature recurring character — use this EXACT design every time a teacher / professor / sensei / lecturer / explainer character appears): a friendly middle-aged Japanese man in his late 40s. Short dark-brown, slightly wavy and curly hair with a bit of volume on top. Thin dark rectangular eyeglasses. Small kind eyes and a gentle warm smile. Light skin. He always wears a GRAY textured tweed blazer over a DARK RED (wine / maroon) V-neck sweater. Warm, approachable, trustworthy teacher who often gestures with open hands as he explains. Keep his face, hairstyle, glasses, and gray-blazer-over-dark-red-sweater outfit IDENTICAL in every scene he appears in. A friendly young Japanese university student may appear as a secondary recurring character (consistent simple design). Palette: warm, trustworthy tones with one calm accent color (avoid all-blue monotony). Keep character design, line weight, color palette, and flat-vector style unified across every scene so the whole video feels like one cohesive series.
